name: Mazorro Resources Inc.
description: Mazorro Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based exploration company that was historically focused on the identification, acquisition, and development of precious metal mineral properties, particularly gold, copper, and silver deposits. While early operations targeted regions in Mexico and Canada's Abitibi Gold district, the company has undergone significant corporate changes, with various financial sources associating its listing with the evolution into Tetra Bio-Pharma Inc., a firm engaged in the development of cannabinoid-derived biopharmaceuticals and medical products. The company has been listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and other international exchanges.
